surfaces.solicitorVisibleText: The defence asks the court to record that the s172 notice/requirement to identify the driver, keeper position, and service/nomination records require confirmation before the defence position on driver identification is fixed.

surfaces.label: Client-safe summary
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText:
CLIENT-SAFE SUMMARY
(not for court or CPS)

We are reviewing the papers for Ella Shaw. This is early-stage — nothing is final until we have full disclosure and your instructions. A breath/device procedure summary is on the papers, but calibration certificates, the full intoxilyser record, and any CCTV/dashcam export are still outstanding. Device reliability remains provisional.

[CaseBrain — client-safe summary. Evidence state: provisional. Not for court or CPS use.]
